turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi there. Do you have an MRI facility in-house or do patients need to go elsewhere?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Great question. Yes, we have a fully equipped radiology department in-house, including an MRI machine, CT scanner, and digital X-ray. All imaging is done on site.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: That's convenient. And how long does it usually take to get results?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: For most routine scans, the radiologist's report is ready within 4 to 6 hours. Urgent cases are prioritised and can be done in 1 to 2 hours.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Can I book a scan without a doctor's referral?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: A doctor's prescription is required for MRI and CT scans. For X-rays, in some cases we can proceed at the radiologist's discretion. Our staff at the radiology desk can advise you when you arrive.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Understood. Thank you for the info.
